name: team_success_rate_from_plays multi-year LIST wrap projects bare pooled rate
description: Regression (non-offset multi-year year LIST, player subject -> wrap mode): wrap collapses _team_stats to pid-grain and carries num/den, but the non-offset main-select reads the bare _team_stats.team_success_rate_from_plays via the column_value path, which the wrap CTE never emitted -> `column ..._team_stats.team_success_rate_from_plays does not exist`. The fix has the wrap CTE also project sum(num)/NULLIF(sum(den),0) as <stat> (raw fraction, no x100) outside an offset range. AVG carve-outs and additive measures were unaffected (wrap projects their bare sum). The num/den remain for the with_where/HAVING filter path.
expected_query: with "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(CASE WHEN successful_play = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator, COUNT(*) as team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023, 2024) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(nfl_team ORDER BY game_count DESC, nfl_team ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."season_year" as "year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2023, 2024) and "player_gamelogs"."season_year" in (2023, 2024) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."season_year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats" as materialized (select "player_year_teams"."pid", sum(t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c.team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator) as team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator, sum(t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c.team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator) as team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator, sum(t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c.team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator) / NULLIF(sum(t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c.team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator), 0) as team_success_rate_from_plays from "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c" inner join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."team" = "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."nfl_team" and "player_year_teams"."year" = "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."year" group by "player_year_teams"."pid"), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2023,2024]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."team_success_rate_from_plays" AS "team_success_rate_from_plays_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2024 inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats" on "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.primary_position IN ('QB') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."team_success_rate_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
